rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.501 merely defines 'program' for the Texas Troops to Teachers Program. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 21.501. DEFINITION. In this subchapter, "program" means the Texas Troops to Teachers Program.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
